prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约12316名、11843名、11476名、10041名、11426名，整体呈波动走势。2024年达到近年最低点10041名后，2025年回升至11426名，近两年波动幅度约1385名，显示该校在北京考生中的报考热度存在一定不稳定性；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为60人，2025年缩减至52人，2026年回升至58人，较2025年扩招约11.5%。扩招在一定程度上缓解了竞争压力，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第39名、2025年第40名，排名稳定在40名左右，属于国内顶尖211高校，在电子信息领域具有显著影响力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园霸凌事件，对报考心理有一定抑制作用；抖音热度评价为较热（总排名第60位），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，整体关注度尚可。历史投档异常记录中未见西电出现断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，在电子信息类高校中实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，均为西电核心优势专业，持续吸引高分考生。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；2026年；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，在北京属于跨省招生，本地无地域偏好加成；该校在北京招生计划占比较小，地域因素对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11426名、2026年扩招约11.5%的缓解效应、北京考生总数大幅增长29.7%带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面的轻微抑制以及核心专业高热度的吸引作用，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移，预测最低位次约12017名，区间11517–12517名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班）
- 计算机类（创新实验班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家拔尖基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）
- 电子信息类（通信）
- 计算机类（智能）
- 计算机类（网络安全）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 外国语言文学类（新文科国际语言与电子信息交叉融合培养）
- 中国语言文学类（新人文学科与电子信息融合培养）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约12017名，区间11517–12517名。位次在区间内建议以二档电子信息类、计算机类为主力填报，一档创新实验班可冲刺，三档人文语言类专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<11517名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>12517名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 12,316, 11,843, 11,476, 10,041, and 11,426, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, it reached a recent low of 10,041, then rebounded to 11,426 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1,385 in the past two years, indicating some instability in the popularity of this university among Beijing candidates. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 60 from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 52 in 2025, and increased to 58 in 2026, an expansion of about 11.5% compared to 2025. The expansion alleviates competitive pressure to some extent, but the magnitude is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 39th in 2026 and 40th in 2025 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, stable around 40th, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities in China, with significant influence in the field of electronic information. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus bullying incidents, which has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. The Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot (ranked 60th overall), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, and overall attention is acceptable. No signs of admission gaps were found in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, and Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting the university's strength in electronic information fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended in 2024, and Computer majors are recommended, both being core advantageous majors of Xidian, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of Beijing candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment for Beijing, with no local regional preference advantage. The enrollment plan in Beijing accounts for a small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 11,426 in 2025, the easing effect of an approximately 11.5% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 29.7% increase in Beijing candidate numbers, the slight suppression from a negative reputation, and the attraction of core high-heat majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 12,017, with a range of 11,517 to 12,517.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Top-notch Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Communication)
- Computer Science (Intelligence)
- Computer Science (Cybersecurity)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (New Liberal Arts International Language and Electronic Information Cross-disciplinary Integration)
- Chinese Language and Literature (New Humanities and Electronic Information Integration)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 12,017, range 11,517–12,517. Candidates with rankings within the range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 Electronic Information and Computer majors, with Tier 1 Innovation Experimental Classes as reach options, and Tier 3 Humanities and Language majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<11,517) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the lower limit (>12,517) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.
